Clifford Lee Beem, Esq. of Beem & Isley, PC, Tel. 303.894.8100, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court took PLAINTIFFS EMILIO DIAZ AND ROSANNETTE MANTECON'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, Requests For Production Of Documents; And For Sanctions under submission. Defendant shall email a proposed order in Word format to pcc@manningllp.com by 5pm today. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

RULING: The Court did not hear argument as defendant did not file an opposition nor give notice that he will be contesting the tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF CLIFFORD L. BEEM, ESQ. FOR ADMISSION AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR PLAINTIFFS EMILIO DIAZ AND ROSANNETTE MANTECON is Granted pursuant to CRC 9.40. No opposition filed.
